props.name: src
props.description: URL the preview iframe frames. Consumer-controlled.

props.name: files
props.type: { path: string; url?: undefined | string; code?: undefined | string; language?: undefined | string; type?: undefined | "html" | "pdf" | "image" | "other" }[]
props.description: Files for the Code tab tree + each file's preview `url`. Set as a JS property (array).
props.typeShape: { path: string; url?: undefined | string; code?: undefined | string; language?: undefined | string; type?: undefined | "html" | "pdf" | "image" | "other" }[]
props.displayType: { path: string; url?: undefined | string; code?: undefined | string; language?: undefined | string; type?: undefined | "html" | "pdf" | "image" | "other" }[]

props.name: tab
props.description: Active tab: `preview` (default) or `code`.

props.name: activeFile
props.description: Selected file path — syncs the tree highlight, Code source, and preview.

props.name: sandbox
props.description: iframe `sandbox` override. Secure default `allow-scripts allow-forms` (NOT `allow-same-origin`).

props.name: iframeTitle
props.description: Accessible title for the preview iframe.

props.name: maximized
props.description: Reflects the artifact's own maximized view-state (usually driven by the protocol).

props.name: expandable
props.description: Show the expand-to-fill button (OPT-IN).

props.name: openInTab
props.description: Show the open-in-new-tab button (OPT-IN).

props.name: noNav
props.description: Hide back/forward.

props.name: noReload
props.description: Hide reload.

props.name: noHome
props.description: Hide home.

props.name: noPathField
props.description: Hide the address field.

props.name: noTabs
props.description: Hide the Preview|Code toggle.

props.name: standalone
props.description: Standalone chrome: rounded corners + border (else square, borderless in-panel).

props.name: readonlyPath
props.description: Show the address but make it read-only (visible, nav-tracking, non-editable).

events.name: kai-file-select
events.description: Fired when a file is selected. `detail.path`.

events.name: kai-maximize-change
events.description: Artifact's own maximize button toggled (consumer-observable; non-bubbling).

events.name: kai-navigate
events.description: Fired when the preview navigates. `detail.url` = the new location.

events.name: kai-tab-change
events.description: Fired when the Preview|Code tab changes. `detail.tab`.

props.name: items
props.type: { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[]
props.description: The attachments to render. Set as a JS property (array).
props.typeShape: { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[]

props.name: variant
props.description: Layout: `grid` = visual tiles, `inline` = icon + label chips, `list` = rows.

props.name: hoverCard
props.description: Wrap each item in a hover card that previews its details.

props.name: removable
props.description: Show a remove button per item; clicking it fires a `kai-remove` event.

props.name: showMediaType
props.description: Also show the media type beneath the filename (non-grid variants).

props.name: emptyText
props.description: Text shown when `items` is empty.

events.name: kai-remove
events.description: A remove button was clicked.

props.name: heading
props.description: Heading rendered in the card chrome (= CardEnvelope.title). Attribute: `heading`.

props.name: description
props.description: Supporting text under the heading. Attribute: `description`.

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: When set, the card renders its inline error state instead of the body. Attribute: `error-message`.

props.name: dense
props.description: Compact spacing for dense lists. Attribute: `dense`.

props.name: cards
props.type: undefined | { type: string; id: string; data: unknown; title?: undefined | string; resolution?: undefined | { kind: "action"; action: string; payload?: unknown; at?: undefined | string } | { kind: "submit"; data: unknown; at?: undefined | string } | { kind: "dismissed"; at?: undefined | string } | { kind: "expired"; reason?: undefined | string; at?: undefined | string } }[]
props.description: The stream of card envelopes to render. Set as a JS PROPERTY: `el.cards = [...]`.
props.displayType: undefined | { type: string; id: string; data: unknown; title?: undefined | string; resolution?: undefined | { kind: "action"; action: string; payload?: unknown; at?: undefined | string } | { kind: "submit"; data: unknown; at?: undefined | string } | { kind: "dismissed"; at?: undefined | string } | { kind: "expired"; reason?: undefined | string; at?: undefined | string } }[]

props.name: types
props.description: Optional type→tag overrides/additions (merged over the built-ins). Property: `el.types`. Typed as a plain string map (not the `CardTagMap` alias) so the generated React wrapper inlines it instead of emitting an unresolved named type.

props.name: policy
props.type: undefined | { onSubmit?: undefined | (cardId: string, data: unknown) => void; onAction?: undefined | (cardId: string, action: string, payload?: unknown) => void; onSendPrompt?: undefined | (text: string, opts: { mode: "compose" | "send"; context?: unknown; }) => void; onOpen?: undefined | (url: string, target: "tab" | "artifact") => void; onState?: undefined | (cardId: string, patch: unknown) => void; onDismiss?: undefined | (cardId: string) => void; onReopen?: undefined | (cardId: string) => void; onError?: undefined | (cardId: string, message: string) => void; maxSendPromptMode?: undefined | "compose" | "send" }
props.description: Optional CardPolicy handling child events. Property: `el.policy`.
props.displayType: undefined | { onSubmit?: undefined | (cardId: string, data: unknown) => void; onAction?: undefined | (cardId: string, action: string, payload?: unknown) => void; onSendPrompt?: undefined | (text: string, opts: { mode: "compose" | "send"; context?: unknown; }) => void; onOpen?: undefined | (url: string, target: "tab" | "artifact") => void; onState?: undefined | (cardId: string, patch: unknown) => void; onDismiss?: undefined | (cardId: string) => void; onReopen?: undefined | (cardId: string) => void; onError?: undefined | (cardId: string, message: string) => void; maxSendPromptMode?: undefined | "compose" | "send" }

props.name: steps
props.description: The reasoning steps. Set as a JS property. Compound sub-parts collapse to this one data model (Route 1).

props.name: messages
props.type: { id: string; role: "user" | "assistant"; content: string; reasoning?: undefined | { text: string; label?: undefined | string }; tools?: undefined | { type: string; state: "input-streaming" | "input-available" | "output-available" | "output-error"; input?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; output?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; toolCallId?: undefined | string; errorText?: undefined | string }[]; attachments?: undefined | { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[]; actions?: undefined | ("copy" | "like" | "dislike" | "regenerate" | "edit" | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; tooltip?: undefined | string })[]; avatar?: undefined | { src?: undefined | string; fallback?: undefined | string; alt?: undefined | string }; feedback?: undefined | "like" | "dislike" }[]
props.description: The full message thread to render, newest last. Each entry carries its role, content, and optional reasoning/tools/attachments/actions. Set as a JS property (`el.messages = [...]`).
props.typeShape: { id: string; role: "user" | "assistant"; content: string; reasoning?: undefined | { text: string; label?: undefined | string }; tools?: undefined | { type: string; state: "input-streaming" | "input-available" | "output-available" | "output-error"; input?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; output?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; toolCallId?: undefined | string; errorText?: undefined | string }[]; attachments?: undefined | { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[]; actions?: undefined | ("copy" | "like" | "dislike" | "regenerate" | "edit" | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; tooltip?: undefined | string })[]; avatar?: undefined | { src?: undefined | string; fallback?: undefined | string; alt?: undefined | string }; feedback?: undefined | "like" | "dislike" }[]
props.displayType: { id: string; role: "user" | "assistant"; content: string; reasoning?: undefined | { text: string; label?: undefined | string }; tools?: undefined | { type: string; state: "input-streaming" | "input-available" | "output-available" | "output-error"; input?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; output?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; toolCallId?: undefined | string; errorText?: undefined | string }[]; attachments?: undefined | { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[]; actions?: undefined | ("copy" | "like" | "dislike" | "regenerate" | "edit" | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; tooltip?: undefined | string })[]; avatar?: undefined | { src?: undefined | string; fallback?: undefined | string; alt?: undefined | string }; feedback?: undefined | "like" | "dislike" }[]

props.name: value
props.type: undefined | string | ({ type: "text"; text: string } | { type: "entity"; entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } })[]
props.description: Value of the input. A **string** is controlled (the host owns the text and updates it on `kai-value-change`). A **ComposerDoc** is a one-time seed that pre-populates pills; the user then edits freely. Leave unset for uncontrolled.
props.displayType: undefined | string | ({ type: "text"; text: string } | { type: "entity"; entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } })[]

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown in the empty input.

props.name: loading
props.description: When true, shows the loading/streaming state and disables submit (use while awaiting the assistant's reply).

props.name: suggestions
props.description: Starter prompts shown above the input when the thread is empty. Clicking one follows `suggestionMode`. Set as a JS property.

props.name: suggestionMode
props.description: What clicking a suggestion does: `'submit'` (default) sends it immediately as if typed and submitted; `'fill'` just places it in the input.

props.name: persistSuggestions
props.description: Keep suggestions visible after the conversation starts. By default suggestions are conversation starters and hide once `messages` is non-empty; set this to keep them always shown. Default false.

props.name: proseSize
props.description: Body/prose font scale for rendered markdown (`'xs' | 'sm' | 'base' | 'lg'`). Defaults to `'sm'`.

props.name: codeTheme
props.description: Shiki theme name for syntax-highlighted code blocks (e.g. `'github-dark-dimmed'`).

props.name: codeHighlight
props.description: Enable Shiki syntax highlighting in code blocks. Turn off to render plain `<pre>` blocks (lighter, no highlighter load). Default true.

props.name: chatTitle
props.description: Optional header title shown on the left of the header.

props.name: models
props.type: undefined | { id: string; name: string; provider?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; group?: undefined | string }[]
props.description: Optional model list. When set (>1 model) a ModelSwitcher is shown in the header and a `kai-model-change` event fires on selection.
props.displayType: undefined | { id: string; name: string; provider?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; group?: undefined | string }[]

props.name: currentModel
props.description: The currently selected model id (pairs with `models`).

props.name: context
props.type: undefined | { usedTokens: number; maxTokens: number; inputTokens?: undefined | number; outputTokens?: undefined | number; estimatedCost?: undefined | number }
props.description: Optional context-window token usage. When set, a Context token meter is shown in the header.

props.name: scrollButton
props.description: Show the scroll-to-bottom button inside the scroll area. Default true.

props.name: headerStart
props.description: Whether the host has `slot="header-start"` content (left of the title) — set by the `<kai-chat>` facade so a custom control forces the header open.

props.name: headerEnd
props.description: Whether the host has `slot="header-end"` content (right of the controls).

props.name: search
props.description: Show a Search (Globe) button in the input toolbar; fires a `search` event.

props.name: voice
props.description: Show a Voice (Mic) button in the input toolbar; fires a `voice` event.

props.name: triggers
props.type: undefined | { char: string; kind: string; items?: undefined | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; group?: undefined | string; kind?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[] }[]
props.description: Rich entity triggers — each `{ char, kind, items }` opens a caret-anchored menu that inserts an atomic pill (`/` skills, `@` agents/plugins). Set as a JS property; forwarded to the input.
props.displayType: undefined | { char: string; kind: string; items?: undefined | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; group?: undefined | string; kind?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[] }[]

props.name: kindIcons
props.description: Default icon per entity kind (kind → image src) for pills/menu items.

props.name: actionsReveal
props.description: Whether each message's action bar is always visible (`'always'`, default) or only revealed on hover of that message row (`'hover'`).

events.name: kai-message-action
events.detail: { messageId: string; action: string; state?: undefined | "on" | "off" }
events.description: An action button on a message was clicked. `action` is the built-in name or custom id. `state` is present only for the toggleable feedback votes: `'on'` when a like/dislike is set, `'off'` when re-tapped to clear.
events.displayDetail: { messageId: string; action: string; state?: undefined | "on" | "off" }

events.name: kai-model-change
events.description: The header model switcher changed.

events.name: kai-search
events.description: The Search button was clicked.

events.name: kai-submit
events.detail: { value: string; attachments: { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[] }
events.description: User submitted a message.

events.name: kai-suggestion-click
events.description: A suggestion chip was clicked (only in `suggestion-mode="fill"`).

events.name: kai-value-change
events.description: Fired on every input change.

events.name: kai-voice
events.description: The Mic / voice button was clicked.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional text beside the icon.

props.name: tooltip
props.description: Tooltip on hover.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual button style.

props.name: size
props.description: Button size (use an `icon*` size for an icon-only checkpoint).

events.name: kai-select
events.description: The checkpoint was clicked.

props.name: data
props.description: The choice definition (the CardEnvelope.data). Set as a JS PROPERTY: `el.data = { prompt, options:[…], allowOther?, submitLabel? }`. Import `ChoiceCardData` from `@kitn.ai/ui` for the full shape.

props.name: cardId
props.description: Stable card id correlating every emitted CardEvent. Attribute: `card-id`.

props.name: heading
props.description: Heading rendered in the card chrome (= CardEnvelope.title). Attribute: `heading`.

props.name: resolution
props.description: Set when the user resolved this card; renders the read-only view. Property: `el.resolution = { kind:'action', action:'…' }`.

props.name: code
props.description: The source code to render.

props.name: language
props.description: Language grammar (e.g. `js`, `python`). Defaults to `tsx`.

props.name: codeTheme
props.description: Shiki theme name.

props.name: codeHighlight
props.description: Disable syntax highlighting (renders plain text, no Shiki).

props.name: proseSize
props.description: Code text sizing.

props.name: data
props.description: The compare definition (prompt + the two candidates). Set as a JS PROPERTY: `el.data = { prompt, candidates: [A, B], collapse? }`. Import `ResponseCompareData` from `@kitn.ai/ui` for the full shape.

props.name: compareId
props.description: Stable id correlating every emitted event. Attribute: `compare-id`.

props.name: selection
props.description: Re-hydrate / control the user's pick. Set as a JS PROPERTY: `el.selection = { chosenId, rejectedIds }`. Renders the collapsed winner.

props.name: layout
props.description: Layout: `'auto'` (default — columns when wide, tabs when narrow, by CONTAINER width) | `'columns'` (side-by-side) | `'tabs'` (pills to switch). Attribute: `layout`.

props.name: proseSize
props.description: Prose/text size for the rendered candidates. Attribute: `prose-size`.

props.name: codeTheme
props.description: Shiki theme for code blocks in the candidates. Attribute: `code-theme`.

props.name: codeHighlight
props.description: Whether code blocks are syntax-highlighted. Attribute: `code-highlight`.

events.name: kai-compare-select
events.detail: { chosenId: string; rejectedIds: string[]; at?: undefined | number }
events.description: The user committed a pick. `detail` = `{ chosenId, rejectedIds, at }`.
events.displayDetail: { chosenId: string; rejectedIds: string[]; at?: undefined | number }

events.name: kai-error
events.description: The definition was unusable.

events.name: kai-ready
events.description: Both candidates have settled and the pick is live.

props.name: value
props.type: undefined | string | ({ type: "text"; text: string } | { type: "entity"; entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } })[]
props.description: Controlled value — string or a full ComposerDoc (set as JS property).
props.displayType: undefined | string | ({ type: "text"; text: string } | { type: "entity"; entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } })[]

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when the composer is empty.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the composer entirely (non-interactive).

props.name: loading
props.description: Show a loading/streaming state and block submit.

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Maximum height in px before the content scrolls. Default 240.

props.name: submitOnEnter
props.description: Whether pressing Enter (without Shift) submits. Default true.

props.name: triggers
props.type: undefined | { char: string; kind: string; items?: undefined | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; group?: undefined | string; kind?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[] }[]
props.description: Trigger definitions — set as a JS property.
props.displayType: undefined | { char: string; kind: string; items?: undefined | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; group?: undefined | string; kind?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[] }[]

props.name: highlights
props.type: undefined | (string | { pattern: string; flags?: undefined | string; class?: undefined | string })[]
props.description: Keyword highlight rules — set as a JS property.
props.displayType: undefined | (string | { pattern: string; flags?: undefined | string; class?: undefined | string })[]

props.name: kindIcons
props.description: Default icon per entity kind (kind → image URL/data-URI) for items without their own `icon`. Overrides the built-in agent/plugin glyphs. JS property.

events.name: kai-blur
events.description: The composer lost focus.

events.name: kai-entity-add
events.detail: { entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } }
events.description: An entity pill was inserted into the composer.
events.displayDetail: { entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } }

events.name: kai-entity-remove
events.detail: { entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } }
events.description: An entity pill was deleted from the composer.
events.displayDetail: { entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } }

events.name: kai-focus
events.description: The composer gained focus. `focus`/`blur` are NOT composed natively, so they don't escape the shadow root — these re-expose them on the host. (For `keydown`/`paste`/`focusin`/`focusout`, listen NATIVELY on `<kai-composer>`: they're composed and already cross the shadow boundary.)

events.name: kai-submit
events.detail: { doc: ({ type: "text"; text: string } | { type: "entity"; entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } })[]; text: string; entities: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[] }
events.description: The user submitted the composer (Enter or programmatic submit).
events.displayDetail: { doc: ({ type: "text"; text: string } | { type: "entity"; entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } })[]; text: string; entities: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[] }

events.name: kai-trigger
events.detail: { char: string; query: string; rect: DOMRect }
events.description: A trigger character was detected at the caret (e.g. `/` or `@`).
events.displayDetail: { char: string; query: string; rect: DOMRect }

events.name: kai-trigger-close
events.description: The active trigger was dismissed (Escape, space, or outside click).

events.name: kai-value-change
events.detail: { doc: ({ type: "text"; text: string } | { type: "entity"; entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } })[]; text: string; entities: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[] }
events.description: The content changed (fires on every input event).
events.displayDetail: { doc: ({ type: "text"; text: string } | { type: "entity"; entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } })[]; text: string; entities: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[] }

props.name: data
props.description: The confirm definition (the CardEnvelope.data). Set as a JS PROPERTY: `el.data = { body, tone, actions:[…] }`. Import `ConfirmCardData` from `@kitn.ai/ui` for the full shape.

props.name: cardId
props.description: Stable card id correlating every emitted CardEvent. Attribute: `card-id`.

props.name: heading
props.description: Heading rendered in the card chrome (= CardEnvelope.title). Attribute: `heading`.

props.name: autofocus
props.description: Focus the default action on mount (off by default — no focus-stealing). Attribute: `autofocus`.

props.name: resolution
props.description: Set when the user resolved this card; renders the read-only view. Property: `el.resolution = { kind:'action', action:'…' }`.

props.name: context
props.type: undefined | { usedTokens: number; maxTokens: number; inputTokens?: undefined | number; outputTokens?: undefined | number; reasoningTokens?: undefined | number; cacheTokens?: undefined | number; estimatedCost?: undefined | number }
props.description: Token-usage data. Set as a JS property.

props.name: warnThreshold
props.description: Fraction (0–1) above which the meter turns yellow. Defaults to `0.7` (70%).

props.name: dangerThreshold
props.description: Fraction (0–1) above which the meter turns red. Defaults to `0.9` (90%).

events.name: kai-threshold-change
events.description: Fires when the computed severity level changes (ok → warn → danger or back). `detail.level` is `'ok'`, `'warn'`, or `'danger'`.

props.name: groups
props.type: { id: string; userId?: undefined | string; teamId?: undefined | string; name: string; sortOrder: number; createdAt: string }[]
props.description: Pre-bucketed conversation groups (e.g. "Today", "Yesterday"), each with its own conversations. Use this when you want to control the grouping/headers yourself; otherwise pass a flat `conversations` array. Set as a JS property.
props.typeShape: { id: string; userId?: undefined | string; teamId?: undefined | string; name: string; sortOrder: number; createdAt: string }[]

props.name: conversations
props.type: { id: string; title: string; groupId?: undefined | string; scope: { type: "document" | "collection"; documentId?: undefined | string; filters?: undefined | { tags?: undefined | string[]; authors?: undefined | string[]; contentType?: undefined | "transcript" | "markdown"; dateRange?: undefined | { from: string; to: string } } }; messageCount: number; lastMessageAt: string; updatedAt: string }[]
props.description: A flat list of conversation summaries; the component buckets them by recency for you. Ignored when `groups` is provided. Set as a JS property.
props.typeShape: { id: string; title: string; groupId?: undefined | string; scope: { type: "document" | "collection"; documentId?: undefined | string; filters?: undefined | { tags?: undefined | string[]; authors?: undefined | string[]; contentType?: undefined | "transcript" | "markdown"; dateRange?: undefined | { from: string; to: string } } }; messageCount: number; lastMessageAt: string; updatedAt: string }[]

props.name: activeId
props.description: The id of the currently-open conversation, highlighted in the list.

events.name: kai-conversation-select
events.description: A conversation was selected.

events.name: kai-new-chat
events.description: The "New chat" button was clicked.

events.name: kai-toggle-sidebar
events.description: The sidebar toggle was clicked.

props.name: cardId
props.description: Stable card id correlating every emitted event. Set as an attribute or property.

props.name: data
props.type: undefined | { provider: "youtube" | "vimeo" | "generic"; id?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string; poster?: undefined | string; start?: undefined | number; aspectRatio?: undefined | "16:9" | "4:3" | "1:1" | "9:16" }
props.description: The embed payload (provider + id/url + options). Set as a JS **property** (object).
props.displayType: undefined | { provider: "youtube" | "vimeo" | "generic"; id?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string; poster?: undefined | string; start?: undefined | number; aspectRatio?: undefined | "16:9" | "4:3" | "1:1" | "9:16" }

props.name: emptyTitle
props.description: Title text. Attribute: `empty-title` (`title` is a global HTML attribute).

props.name: description
props.description: Description text.

props.name: barTitle
props.description: The banner label (e.g. "Was this helpful?"). Attribute: `bar-title` (`title` is avoided — it's a global HTML attribute).

props.name: collectDetail
props.description: When set, a not-helpful vote opens an optional detail form before the thank-you confirmation. Attribute: `collect-detail`.

props.name: categories
props.description: Optional category chips for the detail form. Set as a JS property (array).

props.name: detailTitle
props.description: Heading for the detail form. Attribute: `detail-title`.

props.name: detailPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder for the detail comment box. Attribute: `detail-placeholder`.

props.name: submitLabel
props.description: Submit button label in the detail form. Attribute: `submit-label`.

props.name: thanksMessage
props.description: Confirmation copy shown after a vote/submit. Attribute: `thanks-message`.

events.name: kai-close
events.description: The user dismissed the banner.

events.name: kai-feedback
events.description: The user rated the response. `value` is `'helpful'` or `'not-helpful'`.

events.name: kai-feedback-detail
events.detail: { value: "helpful" | "not-helpful"; category?: undefined | string; comment?: undefined | string }
events.description: The user submitted the optional detail form (`collect-detail`).
events.displayDetail: { value: "helpful" | "not-helpful"; category?: undefined | string; comment?: undefined | string }

props.name: files
props.type: { path: string; url?: undefined | string; code?: undefined | string; language?: undefined | string; type?: undefined | "html" | "pdf" | "image" | "other" }[]
props.description: The files to render. Set as a JS property (array of `{ path, url?, code?, language?, type? }`).
props.typeShape: { path: string; url?: undefined | string; code?: undefined | string; language?: undefined | string; type?: undefined | "html" | "pdf" | "image" | "other" }[]
props.displayType: { path: string; url?: undefined | string; code?: undefined | string; language?: undefined | string; type?: undefined | "html" | "pdf" | "image" | "other" }[]

props.name: activeFile
props.description: Selected file path — highlighted in the tree.

props.name: defaultExpanded
props.description: Folder paths expanded initially. Omit to start with all folders open.

events.name: kai-select
events.description: Fired when a file is selected. `detail.path` = the file's path.

props.name: multiple
props.description: Allow selecting multiple files (default true).

props.name: accept
props.description: `accept` attribute for the file picker (e.g. `image/*`).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the dropzone — no clicking, no drag-and-drop.

props.name: label
props.description: Default dropzone label (overridable via the default slot).

events.name: kai-files-added
events.description: Files were picked or dropped.

props.name: data
props.description: The form definition — a JSON Schema (`type:'object'`) + `x-kai-*` UI hints (the CardEnvelope.data). Set as a JS PROPERTY: `el.data = { type:'object', properties:{…} }`. Import the `FormDefinition` type from `@kitn.ai/ui` for the full shape (it is self-referential, so the element types it loosely).

props.name: cardId
props.description: Stable card id correlating every emitted CardEvent. Attribute: `card-id`.

props.name: heading
props.description: Heading rendered in the card chrome (= CardEnvelope.title). Attribute: `heading`.

props.name: resolution
props.description: Set when the user resolved this card; renders the read-only view. Property: `el.resolution = { kind:'submit', data:{…} }`.

props.name: base64
props.description: Base64-encoded image data (pair with `media-type`).

props.name: bytes
props.description: Raw image bytes (set as a JS property).

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text.

props.name: mediaType
props.description: MIME type (default `image/png`).

props.name: cardId
props.description: Stable card id correlating every emitted event. Set as an attribute or property.

props.name: data
props.type: undefined | { url: string; title?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; image?: undefined | string; imageAlt?: undefined | string; favicon?: undefined | string; domain?: undefined | string; siteName?: undefined | string }
props.description: The link payload (OG metadata). Set as a JS **property** (object).
props.displayType: undefined | { url: string; title?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; image?: undefined | string; imageAlt?: undefined | string; favicon?: undefined | string; domain?: undefined | string; siteName?: undefined | string }

props.name: variant
props.description: The animation style: `'circular' | 'classic' | 'pulse' | 'pulse-dot' | 'dots' | 'typing' | 'wave' | 'bars' | 'terminal' | 'text-blink' | 'text-shimmer' | 'loading-dots'`. Defaults to `'circular'`.

props.name: size
props.description: Loader size: `'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'`. Defaults to `'md'`.

props.name: text
props.description: Label for the text-based variants.

props.name: content
props.description: The markdown source to render.

props.name: proseSize
props.description: Text/markdown sizing.

props.name: codeTheme
props.description: Shiki theme for fenced code blocks.

props.name: codeHighlight
props.description: Disable syntax highlighting (no Shiki loads).

props.name: message
props.type: undefined | { id: string; role: "user" | "assistant"; content: string; reasoning?: undefined | { text: string; label?: undefined | string }; tools?: undefined | { type: string; state: "input-streaming" | "input-available" | "output-available" | "output-error"; input?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; output?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; toolCallId?: undefined | string; errorText?: undefined | string }[]; attachments?: undefined | { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[]; actions?: undefined | ("copy" | "like" | "dislike" | "regenerate" | "edit" | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; tooltip?: undefined | string })[]; avatar?: undefined | { src?: undefined | string; fallback?: undefined | string; alt?: undefined | string }; feedback?: undefined | "like" | "dislike" }
props.description: The full message object. Set as a JS property.
props.displayType: undefined | { id: string; role: "user" | "assistant"; content: string; reasoning?: undefined | { text: string; label?: undefined | string }; tools?: undefined | { type: string; state: "input-streaming" | "input-available" | "output-available" | "output-error"; input?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; output?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; toolCallId?: undefined | string; errorText?: undefined | string }[]; attachments?: undefined | { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[]; actions?: undefined | ("copy" | "like" | "dislike" | "regenerate" | "edit" | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; tooltip?: undefined | string })[]; avatar?: undefined | { src?: undefined | string; fallback?: undefined | string; alt?: undefined | string }; feedback?: undefined | "like" | "dislike" }

props.name: role
props.description: Convenience for simple cases when not passing a `message` object.

props.name: content
props.description: Convenience content (used when `message` is not set).

props.name: markdown
props.description: Force markdown on/off. Defaults to on for assistant, off for user.

props.name: proseSize
props.description: Text/markdown sizing for the message body.

props.name: codeTheme
props.description: Shiki theme name used for fenced code blocks in the content.

props.name: codeHighlight
props.description: Disable syntax highlighting for code blocks (no Shiki loads).

props.name: actionsReveal
props.description: Whether the action bar is always visible (`'always'`, default) or only revealed on hover of the message row (`'hover'`).

props.name: avatarSrc
props.description: Convenience avatar image URL (used when `message.avatar` is not set).

props.name: avatarFallback
props.description: Convenience avatar fallback text (used when `message.avatar` is not set).

events.name: kai-message-action
events.detail: { messageId: string; action: string; state?: undefined | "on" | "off" }
events.description: An action button was clicked. `action` is the built-in name or custom id. `state` is present only for the toggleable feedback votes: `'on'` when a like/dislike is set, `'off'` when re-tapped to clear.
events.displayDetail: { messageId: string; action: string; state?: undefined | "on" | "off" }

props.name: models
props.type: { id: string; name: string; provider?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; group?: undefined | string }[]
props.description: The selectable models. Set as a JS property (array).
props.typeShape: { id: string; name: string; provider?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; group?: undefined | string }[]
props.displayType: { id: string; name: string; provider?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; group?: undefined | string }[]

props.name: currentModel
props.description: The currently-selected model id. Defaults to the first model.

events.name: kai-model-change
events.description: A model was selected.

props.name: placement
props.description: Floating placement relative to the trigger (floating-ui placement).

props.name: gutter
props.description: Gap in px between the trigger and the panel.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state. Set as a JS property (`el.open = true`) to drive the popover from your app; omit for the default click-to-toggle behaviour.

events.name: kai-open-change
events.description: The popover wants to open or close (click, Escape, or outside-click).

props.name: value
props.type: undefined | string | ({ type: "text"; text: string } | { type: "entity"; entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } })[]
props.description: Value of the input, as a JS property. A **string** is the controlled text mirror (the host owns it and updates on `kai-value-change`). A **ComposerDoc** (array of text/entity segments) is a one-time **seed** that pre-populates pills (skills/agents/plugins); the user then edits freely. Leave unset for uncontrolled behavior. `kai-submit`/`kai-value-change` always emit `value` as the flattened string (back-compat) plus the structured `doc` + `entities`.
props.displayType: undefined | string | ({ type: "text"; text: string } | { type: "entity"; entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } })[]

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown in the empty input.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the input and submit button entirely (non-interactive).

props.name: loading
props.description: Show the loading/streaming state and block submit (use while awaiting a reply).

props.name: suggestions
props.description: Starter prompts shown above the input. Clicking one follows `suggestionMode`. Set as a JS property.

props.name: suggestionMode
props.description: What clicking a suggestion does: `'submit'` (default) sends it immediately as if typed and submitted; `'fill'` just places it in the input.

props.name: search
props.description: Show a Search (Globe) button in the left toolbar; clicking it fires a `search` event.

props.name: voice
props.description: Show a Voice (Mic) button in the left toolbar; clicking it fires a `voice` event.

props.name: stoppable
props.description: When set and `loading` is true, the send button is replaced by a Stop button (square icon, "Stop" aria-label). Clicking it fires `kai-stop`.

props.name: attachments
props.type: undefined | { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[]
props.description: Attachments to seed the input with (so a consumer can pre-populate staged files without an upload). Set as a JS property; the element then manages its own attachment state from there (add via the paperclip, remove per chip).

props.name: triggers
props.type: undefined | { char: string; kind: string; items?: undefined | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; group?: undefined | string; kind?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[] }[]
props.description: Rich entity triggers — each `{ char, kind, items }` opens a caret-anchored menu that inserts an atomic pill. Convention: `/` → skills, `@` → agents (plugins are the grouping/provenance of those items). Set as a JS property.
props.displayType: undefined | { char: string; kind: string; items?: undefined | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; group?: undefined | string; kind?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[] }[]

props.name: kindIcons
props.description: Default icon per entity kind (kind → image URL/data-URI) for pills/menu items without their own `icon`. Overrides the built-in agent/plugin glyphs. JS property.

events.name: kai-search
events.description: The Search (Globe) toolbar button was clicked.

events.name: kai-stop
events.description: The Stop button was clicked while `stoppable` and `loading` are both true.

events.name: kai-submit
events.detail: { value: string; doc: ({ type: "text"; text: string } | { type: "entity"; entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } })[]; entities: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[]; attachments: { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[] }
events.description: The user submitted the prompt (Enter or send button). `value` is the flattened text (back-compat); `doc` is the structured document and `entities` the inserted pills (skills/agents) for downstream expansion.
events.displayDetail: { value: string; doc: ({ type: "text"; text: string } | { type: "entity"; entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } })[]; entities: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[]; attachments: { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[] }

events.name: kai-suggestion-click
events.description: A suggestion was clicked while `suggestion-mode="fill"`.

events.name: kai-toolbar-action
events.description: A custom `<kai-action>` toolbar button was clicked. `action` is the `id` of the `<kai-action>` element that was clicked.

events.name: kai-value-change
events.detail: { value: string; doc: ({ type: "text"; text: string } | { type: "entity"; entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } })[]; entities: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[] }
events.description: The input changed (fires on every edit). Carries the flattened `value` plus the structured `doc` + `entities`.
events.displayDetail: { value: string; doc: ({ type: "text"; text: string } | { type: "entity"; entity: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> } })[]; entities: { kind: string; id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[] }

events.name: kai-voice
events.description: The Voice (Mic) toolbar button was clicked.

props.name: text
props.description: The reasoning text to display.

props.name: label
props.description: Trigger label.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state — set as a property (`el.open = true`). Omit for uncontrolled (the trigger toggles it).

props.name: streaming
props.description: While true, auto-expands (and re-collapses when it flips false).

props.name: markdown
props.description: Render `text` as markdown.

events.name: kai-open-change
events.description: Open state changed (via the trigger or streaming auto-open).

props.name: src
props.description: The remote card URL. Attribute: `src`.

props.name: providerOrigin
props.description: Exact provider origin (https: or http://localhost for dev). Attribute: `provider-origin`.

props.name: envelope
props.description: The card envelope to render. JS property only.

props.name: policy
props.description: Optional routing policy. JS property only.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout axis: `horizontal` (row, default) or `vertical` (column).

props.name: maximizedIndex
props.description: Which item index is maximized (null = none). Declarative source of truth.

events.name: kai-change
events.description: Fired on drag-end / keyboard resize / visibility change. `detail.sizes` = panel sizes in percent.

events.name: kai-maximize-change
events.detail: { maximized: false | true; index: null | number }
events.description: Observe layout maximize state.
events.displayDetail: { maximized: false | true; index: null | number }

props.name: size
props.description: Initial main-axis size: `"280px"` (fixed) or `"25%"`/`25` (percent). Omitted → flexible.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum size during resize (px or %).

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum size during resize (px or %).

props.name: locked
props.description: Fix this panel's size; adjacent dividers become non-draggable.

props.name: hidden
props.description: Hide this panel; its divider is dropped and the rest reflow.

props.name: text
props.description: Text to stream. A string, or an `AsyncIterable<string>` (set as a JS property — async iterables can't be HTML attributes).

props.name: mode
props.description: Reveal animation.

props.name: speed
props.description: Characters/segments per tick.

props.name: as
props.description: Element tag to render as.

events.name: kai-complete
events.description: Streaming finished.

props.name: availableAuthors
props.description: Authors to offer as scope filters. Set as a JS property.

props.name: availableTags
props.description: Tags to offer as scope filters. Set as a JS property.

props.name: currentLabel
props.description: The label shown on the trigger for the active scope.

events.name: kai-scope-change
events.detail: { filters: undefined | { tags?: undefined | string[]; authors?: undefined | string[]; contentType?: undefined | "transcript" | "markdown"; dateRange?: undefined | { from: string; to: string } } }
events.description: A scope was chosen (`undefined` filters = "All Content").

props.name: for
props.description: CSS id of the scroll container to control. When omitted the element walks up the DOM (outside its own shadow root) to find the nearest scrollable ancestor. Mirrors the `for` convention of `<label for="...">`.

props.name: variant
props.description: Button visual variant: `'outline' | 'ghost' | 'default'`. Defaults to `'outline'`.

props.name: size
props.description: Button size token. Defaults to `'icon'` (square).

events.name: kai-scroll
events.description: Emitted when the user clicks the button and `scrollToBottom()` is called. Carries no detail — consumers use it to know a manual scroll occurred.

props.name: skills
props.description: The active skills to badge. Set as a JS property.

props.name: href
props.description: The URL this citation links to (the domain also seeds the default label/favicon).

props.name: label
props.description: Trigger label (defaults to the domain).

props.name: headline
props.description: Hover-card headline. Attribute: `headline` (`title` is avoided — it's a global HTML attribute that reflects in a CE constructor and breaks it).

props.name: description
props.description: Hover-card body text describing the source.

props.name: showFavicon
props.description: Show the source's favicon next to the trigger label.

props.name: sources
props.type: { href: string; title?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; label?: undefined | string; showFavicon?: undefined | false | true }[]
props.description: The sources to render. Set as a JS property.
props.typeShape: { href: string; title?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; label?: undefined | string; showFavicon?: undefined | false | true }[]

props.name: showFavicon
props.description: Show favicons on all items (per-item `showFavicon` overrides).

props.name: numbered
props.description: When true, each citation chip is labelled with its 1-based index in the merged (prop + declarative-children) list (`[1]`, `[2]`, …) instead of the per-item `label` or domain fallback. HTML attribute: `numbered` (boolean — bare attribute or `numbered="true"`). JS property: `el.numbered = true`.

props.name: suggestions
props.description: The suggestions. Strings, or `{ label, value }` when the displayed text and the emitted value differ. Set as a JS property.

props.name: variant
props.description: Chip style: `'outline'` (default), `'ghost'`, or `'default'` (filled).

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset for each chip. Defaults to the pill default (`'lg'`); pass `'sm'` for smaller pills (or `'md'`).

props.name: block
props.description: Full-width left-aligned rows instead of pills.

props.name: highlight
props.description: Substring to highlight within each suggestion.

events.name: kai-select
events.description: A suggestion was clicked.

props.name: checked
props.description: Initial checked state. Bare attribute (`<kai-switch checked>`) turns it on.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable interaction.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label.

events.name: kai-change
events.description: The toggle changed.

props.name: data
props.description: The tasks definition (the CardEnvelope.data). Set as a JS PROPERTY: `el.data = { tasks:[…], selectAll, confirmLabel, … }`. Import `TasksCardData` from `@kitn.ai/ui` for the full shape.

props.name: cardId
props.description: Stable card id correlating every emitted CardEvent. Attribute: `card-id`.

props.name: heading
props.description: Heading rendered in the card chrome (= CardEnvelope.title). Attribute: `heading`.

props.name: resolution
props.description: Set when the user resolved this card; renders the read-only view. Property: `el.resolution = { kind:'submit', data:{ selected:[…] } }`.

props.name: text
props.description: The text to shimmer.

props.name: as
props.description: Element tag to render as (default `span`).

props.name: duration
props.description: Animation duration in seconds.

props.name: spread
props.description: Gradient spread (5–45).

props.name: text
props.description: The shimmering label, e.g. "Thinking…".

props.name: stoppable
props.description: When true, show a "stop" affordance that fires a `stop` event.

props.name: stopLabel
props.description: Label for the stop affordance.

events.name: kai-stop
events.description: The "stop / answer now" affordance was clicked.

props.name: toasts
props.type: { id: string; message: string; variant?: undefined | "neutral" | "success"; action?: undefined | { label: string; onAction: () => void | false }; duration?: undefined | number; dismissible?: undefined | false | true; target?: undefined | HTMLElement }[]
props.description: The toasts to render. Newest is shown on top. Set as a JS property (array); pass a new array reference to update.
props.typeShape: { id: string; message: string; variant?: undefined | "neutral" | "success"; action?: undefined | { label: string; onAction: () => void | false }; duration?: undefined | number; dismissible?: undefined | false | true; target?: undefined | HTMLElement }[]
props.displayType: { id: string; message: string; variant?: undefined | "neutral" | "success"; action?: undefined | { label: string; onAction: () => void | false }; duration?: undefined | number; dismissible?: undefined | false | true; target?: undefined | HTMLElement }[]

props.name: position
props.description: Stack anchor: `'top-center'` (default), `'top-right'`, `'bottom-center'`, …

props.name: max
props.description: Max simultaneously-visible toasts; the rest queue. Defaults to `3`.

props.name: stack
props.description: Stacking: 'expanded' (default, full column) | 'collapsed' (Sonner-style pile that expands on hover/focus). Attribute: stack.

props.name: target
props.description: Container element to anchor this region to (JS property). Set by the store for a scoped region; unset = the global viewport region.

events.name: kai-action
events.description: A toast's action button was pressed.

events.name: kai-dismiss
events.description: A toast left the stack. `reason` is `'timeout' | 'close' | 'action'`.

props.name: tool
props.type: undefined | { type: string; state: "input-streaming" | "input-available" | "output-available" | "output-error"; input?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; output?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; toolCallId?: undefined | string; errorText?: undefined | string }
props.description: The tool-call to display. Set as a JS property.

props.name: open
props.description: Start expanded.

props.name: transcribe
props.description: Transcriber the host supplies — records audio, returns the text. This is a **function-valued property** (`el.transcribe = async blob => '...'`) because a value-returning callback can't be modelled as a fire-and-forget event.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable the mic button (non-interactive).

events.name: kai-audio-captured
events.description: Raw audio captured (before transcription) — for hosts that prefer to handle transcription themselves instead of via the `transcribe` property.

events.name: kai-transcription
events.description: Transcription completed (the `transcribe` property resolved).

props.name: groups
props.type: { id: string; userId?: undefined | string; teamId?: undefined | string; name: string; sortOrder: number; createdAt: string }[]
props.description: Pre-bucketed conversation groups for the sidebar. Set as a JS property.
props.typeShape: { id: string; userId?: undefined | string; teamId?: undefined | string; name: string; sortOrder: number; createdAt: string }[]

props.name: conversations
props.type: { id: string; title: string; groupId?: undefined | string; scope: { type: "document" | "collection"; documentId?: undefined | string; filters?: undefined | { tags?: undefined | string[]; authors?: undefined | string[]; contentType?: undefined | "transcript" | "markdown"; dateRange?: undefined | { from: string; to: string } } }; messageCount: number; lastMessageAt: string; updatedAt: string }[]
props.description: Flat conversation list (auto-bucketed if `groups` is empty). Set as a JS property.
props.typeShape: { id: string; title: string; groupId?: undefined | string; scope: { type: "document" | "collection"; documentId?: undefined | string; filters?: undefined | { tags?: undefined | string[]; authors?: undefined | string[]; contentType?: undefined | "transcript" | "markdown"; dateRange?: undefined | { from: string; to: string } } }; messageCount: number; lastMessageAt: string; updatedAt: string }[]

props.name: activeId
props.description: Id of the open conversation, highlighted in the sidebar.

props.name: messages
props.type: { id: string; role: "user" | "assistant"; content: string; reasoning?: undefined | { text: string; label?: undefined | string }; tools?: undefined | { type: string; state: "input-streaming" | "input-available" | "output-available" | "output-error"; input?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; output?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; toolCallId?: undefined | string; errorText?: undefined | string }[]; attachments?: undefined | { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[]; actions?: undefined | ("copy" | "like" | "dislike" | "regenerate" | "edit" | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; tooltip?: undefined | string })[]; avatar?: undefined | { src?: undefined | string; fallback?: undefined | string; alt?: undefined | string }; feedback?: undefined | "like" | "dislike" }[]
props.description: The active conversation's message thread, newest last. Set as a JS property.
props.typeShape: { id: string; role: "user" | "assistant"; content: string; reasoning?: undefined | { text: string; label?: undefined | string }; tools?: undefined | { type: string; state: "input-streaming" | "input-available" | "output-available" | "output-error"; input?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; output?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; toolCallId?: undefined | string; errorText?: undefined | string }[]; attachments?: undefined | { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[]; actions?: undefined | ("copy" | "like" | "dislike" | "regenerate" | "edit" | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; tooltip?: undefined | string })[]; avatar?: undefined | { src?: undefined | string; fallback?: undefined | string; alt?: undefined | string }; feedback?: undefined | "like" | "dislike" }[]
props.displayType: { id: string; role: "user" | "assistant"; content: string; reasoning?: undefined | { text: string; label?: undefined | string }; tools?: undefined | { type: string; state: "input-streaming" | "input-available" | "output-available" | "output-error"; input?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; output?: undefined | Record<string, unknown>; toolCallId?: undefined | string; errorText?: undefined | string }[]; attachments?: undefined | { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[]; actions?: undefined | ("copy" | "like" | "dislike" | "regenerate" | "edit" | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; tooltip?: undefined | string })[]; avatar?: undefined | { src?: undefined | string; fallback?: undefined | string; alt?: undefined | string }; feedback?: undefined | "like" | "dislike" }[]

props.name: models
props.type: undefined | { id: string; name: string; provider?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; group?: undefined | string }[]
props.displayType: undefined | { id: string; name: string; provider?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; group?: undefined | string }[]

props.name: context
props.type: undefined | { usedTokens: number; maxTokens: number; inputTokens?: undefined | number; outputTokens?: undefined | number; estimatedCost?: undefined | number }

props.name: triggers
props.type: undefined | { char: string; kind: string; items?: undefined | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; group?: undefined | string; kind?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[] }[]
props.description: Rich entity triggers (`/` skills, `@` agents/plugins) forwarded to the input.
props.displayType: undefined | { char: string; kind: string; items?: undefined | { id: string; label: string; icon?: undefined | string; description?: undefined | string; group?: undefined | string; kind?: undefined | string; promptText?: undefined | string; data?: undefined | Record<string, unknown> }[] }[]

props.name: kindIcons
props.description: Default icon per entity kind (kind → image src) forwarded to the input.

props.name: sidebarWidth
props.description: Sidebar default width as a percent of the workspace (default 22).

props.name: sidebarMinWidth
props.description: Sidebar min width in px (default 200).

props.name: sidebarMaxWidth
props.description: Sidebar max width in px (default 420).

props.name: sidebarCollapsed
props.description: Controlled collapsed state. Set this as a JS property (`el.sidebarCollapsed = true`) to drive the sidebar from your app, updating it in response to the `kai-sidebar-toggle` event. Omit for uncontrolled (the element manages it).

props.name: defaultSidebarCollapsed
props.description: Initial collapsed state when uncontrolled (default false). Use the `default-sidebar-collapsed` attribute to start collapsed in plain HTML.

events.name: kai-conversation-select
events.description: A conversation was selected in the sidebar.

events.name: kai-message-action
events.detail: { messageId: string; action: string; state?: undefined | "on" | "off" }
events.description: An action button on a message was clicked. `state` is present only for the toggleable feedback votes: `'on'` when a like/dislike is set, `'off'` when re-tapped to clear.
events.displayDetail: { messageId: string; action: string; state?: undefined | "on" | "off" }

events.name: kai-model-change
events.description: The header model switcher changed.

events.name: kai-new-chat
events.description: The "New chat" button was clicked.

events.name: kai-search
events.description: The Search button was clicked.

events.name: kai-sidebar-toggle
events.description: The sidebar was collapsed or expanded.

events.name: kai-submit
events.detail: { value: string; attachments: { id: string; type: "file" | "source-document"; filename?: undefined | string; mediaType?: undefined | string; url?: undefined | string; title?: undefined | string }[] }
events.description: User submitted a message.

events.name: kai-suggestion-click
events.description: A suggestion chip was clicked (only in `suggestion-mode="fill"`).

events.name: kai-value-change
events.description: Fired on every input change.

events.name: kai-voice
events.description: The Mic / voice button was clicked.
